query: BEGIN; ALTER TABLE public.editai_pipelines ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS attention_timeline JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb, ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS script_names JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'::jsonb, ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS generation_job JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb, ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS tts_jobs JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb; NOTIFY pgrst, 'reload schema'; COMMIT;
